## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change, and `pytest tests/` passes locally
- [ ] Works on **both SQLite and PostgreSQL** (CI runs both) — or N/A
- [ ] Schema changes include an **Alembic migration** — or N/A
- [ ] API changes are reflected in `docs/API_CONTRACT.md` — or N/A
- [ ] Frontend builds (`npm run build`) — or N/A
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `Unreleased` for user-visible changes
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or biometric data in the diff
